name: Satay Sauce (Authentic)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the first eight ingredients with enough coconut milk to moisten.
2. Heat oil in a saucepan and gently stir fry the satay mix until it turns a pale pinky brown, then reduce heat to low.
3. Add peanuts and stir well to separate.
4. Add sugar, salt, and tamarind juice.
5. If the sauce is too thick, add coconut milk. If too thin, simmer very gently.
